author: anon-ab6221f8
content: Design doc updated with all renames: crosslink ops -> crosslink dashboard throughout. File renamed to DESIGN-CROSSLINK-DASHBOARD.md. Added new section 16a (what we keep vs rewrite from existing dashboard/ directory — the prune-in-place list) and section 17 (crosslink serve deprecation plan with two-release sunset). Updated section 12 to call out that bundled dashboard directly resolves #429. Fixed ASCII architecture diagram alignment. 765 lines, 18 sections, zero residual 'ops' references.
